_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.spcc: broadband RGB from a mono filter wheel — SPCC runs sensor-null on the composed stack (the generic default; grounding measured immaterial on the one chip with a database curve)
notes.solve: narrow 53-arcmin field at 0.68"/px (FOCALLEN 1150 mm): solve with the position hint + the cached index scales — solve_field.py --ra=270.6 --dec=-23.0 --radius-deg=10 --scales=4-9 (the derived set reaches scale 1; scales 1-3 are multi-GB index downloads; scale 4 carried the solution)
notes.ladders: three single-knob ladders measured on this set: chroma_core 0/2/4 -> gate colour 5/4/3, small real-chroma gains, the blue reflection stays floor-bound (k is NOT its suppressor); cull_pct 0/25/50 -> NULL (identical metrics and panels); black_point 0/4/8 -> sky floor 15/11/7, gate slightly better at the lower floor, faint dust emerges. Candidate chroma_core=2 + black_point=4 rendered lossless, gate PASS (colour 4.0, grad 1.1, blotch 0.9, rings 3.3); pinning awaits the user's judgment vs control + the author's finish
